session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/commands/launch/ -x -v` and report the results. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for the launch command tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on launch command tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 39 items
tests/commands/launch/test_launch_cmd.py ................... [ 48%] tests/commands/launch/test_launch_remote_paths.py .................... [100%]
============================== 39 passed in 1.19s ==============================

pytest passed: All 39 tests in the launch command test suite passed in 1.19 seconds
